steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank contains two nouns in sequence—insecticide and sulfoxaflor—establishing an appositive relationship where the second noun identifies the first.

steps.title: Apply the appositive rule
steps.content: Restrictive appositives (essential for identification) take no commas, while non-restrictive appositives take commas on both sides. Sulfoxaflor identifies which specific insecticide was used, making it restrictive. The other choices either add both commas (non-restrictive treatment) or misplace punctuation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
